definition_en: To send a private message or direct message to someone online, often to initiate a conversation or share information privately.
definition_ko: 온라인에서 누군가에게 비공개 메시지 또는 다이렉트 메시지를 보내는 것, 주로 대화를 시작하거나 정보를 공유할 때 사용한다.
example_en: I just sent you a dm about the meetup.
example_ko: 모임 관련해서 방금 너한테 다이렉트 메시지 보냈어.

definition_en: A short, looping animated image used to express reactions, emotions, or humor online.
definition_ko: 반복 재생되는 짧은 애니메이션 이미지로, 온라인에서 감정이나 반응, 유머를 표현할 때 사용한다.
example_en: Check out this funny gif I found!
example_ko: 이 웃긴 gif 하나 찾았어, 봐봐!

definition_en: Used to indicate amusement, sarcasm, or lightheartedness in online conversations, often to soften a statement or show humor.
definition_ko: 온라인 대화에서 웃기거나, 풍자하거나, 가볍게 웃음을 나타낼 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: That joke made me lol so hard.

definition_en: A casual term used to refer to a friend, buddy, or sometimes a person in a familiar or informal manner, often expressing camaraderie or emphasis.
definition_ko: 친구나 동료를 친근하게 부를 때 쓰는 말로, 우정을 나타내거나 강조할 때 사용한다.
example_en: Thanks for the help, bro!

definition_en: An acronym for 'laughing my ass off,' used to express amusement or that something is very funny, often in online conversations.
definition_ko: 아주 웃기거나 재밌는 상황에 대해 온라인에서 크게 웃음을 표현하는 말이다.
example_en: That video was so funny, lmao!

definition_en: "Kinda" is an informal way of saying "kind of" or "somewhat," used to soften statements or indicate approximation in casual speech or writing.
definition_ko: ‘kind of’의 줄임말로, 말을 부드럽게 하거나 대략적임을 나타낼 때 사용한다.
example_en: I'm kinda tired today.

definition_en: A casual contraction of 'I'm' used to express willingness, agreement, or a state of being in informal online communication.
definition_ko: ‘I am’의 줄임말로, 온라인에서 자신의 상태나 의사를 간단히 표현할 때 사용한다.
example_en: I'm so excited for the trip!

definition_en: Oh My God; exclamation of surprise, shock, excitement, or disbelief
definition_ko: 놀라움이나 충격, 흥분을 표현하는 감탄사이다.
example_en: Omg, I can't believe it!

definition_en: Used to emphasize that something is true or real, often in a way that exaggerates or stresses the statement, even when not literally factual.
definition_ko: 무언가가 사실임을 강조하거나 과장해서 말할 때 사용하는 표현.
example_en: That was literally the best day ever.

definition_en: Used to describe something extraordinary, intense, or unpredictable, often implying it is impressive, extreme, or chaotic.
definition_ko: 놀랍거나 강렬하거나 예측 불가능한 것을 묘사하는 표현.
example_en: The party last night was wild!

definition_en: A casual term for a person, often used to refer to a man or person in an informal, friendly, or sometimes dismissive manner.
definition_ko: 친근하거나 비격식적으로 남성 또는 사람을 부를 때 쓰는 말.
example_en: Hey dude, what's up?

definition_en: To express approval or support for a post or comment by clicking an 'upvote' button, often to help it gain visibility or popularity online.
definition_ko: 게시물이나 댓글에 찬성 또는 지지를 표시하는 온라인 행동.
example_en: Don't forget to upvote my post!
example_ko: 내 게시물에 좋아요 눌러주는 거 잊지 마!

definition_en: Very; extremely (intensifier); also, amazing, unbelievable, or mentally unstable
definition_ko: 매우, 극도로라는 의미의 강한 강조 또는 놀라움, 또는 정신적으로 불안정한 상태를 의미.
example_en: That concert was crazy!

definition_en: Not Gonna Lie; used before an honest or blunt admission
definition_ko: 솔직하거나 직설적인 고백을 하기 전에 쓰는 표현.
example_en: Ngl, I didn't like the movie.

definition_en: Incredibly impressive, extreme, or wild; used to express amazement
definition_ko: 놀라울 정도로 인상적이거나 극단적임을 표현할 때 사용한다.
example_en: Her performance was insane!

definition_en: Used to describe something impressive, stylish, or admirable, often evoking a sense of approval or admiration.
definition_ko: 멋지고 스타일리시하거나 인상적임을 표현할 때 쓰인다.
example_en: Your new phone is so cool!

definition_en: Yeah; yes (informal affirmation)
definition_ko: 그래, 응; 비격식적 긍정을 나타낸다.
example_en: Yeah, I agree, ya.

definition_en: Used as a friendly or informal way to address someone, often implying camaraderie or emphasis in conversation.
definition_ko: 친근하거나 비격식적으로 누군가를 부를 때 쓰며, 우정을 나타낸다.
example_en: Good game, mate!

definition_en: A casual term of endearment or address used to refer to someone affectionately, often in online or informal contexts.
definition_ko: 애정을 담아 친근하게 부르는 말로, 온라인이나 비공식적 상황에서 자주 쓰인다.
example_en: Thanks for helping me out, babe.

definition_en: Expression of agreement or affirmation; 'okay', 'sure', or 'for sure'
definition_ko: 동의하거나 확신할 때 쓰는 표현으로, '알겠어', '확실히'의 의미다.
example_en: I'll be there at 7, bet.

definition_en: Hit Me Up; please contact or message me
definition_ko: 연락하거나 메시지 보내달라는 의미.
example_en: Just hmu if you want to hang out later.

definition_en: Greatest Of All Time; used to describe someone as the absolute best at something
definition_ko: 역대 최고를 의미하며, 어떤 분야에서 최고의 사람을 칭할 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: Serena is the goat at tennis!

definition_en: Describes someone who is relaxed, easygoing, or calm, often used to compliment or describe a laid-back attitude.
definition_ko: 느긋하고 편안한 태도를 가진 사람을 칭하거나, 여유로운 상태를 표현할 때 쓰입니다.
example_en: He's so chill, always relaxed about everything.
example_ko: 그는 정말 느긋해서 항상 편안해 보여.

definition_en: Used to describe something that looks impressive, cool, or excellent, or to express strong positive feelings about something.
definition_ko: 멋지고 인상적이거나 훌륭한 것을 표현할 때 쓰이며, 강한 긍정을 나타냅니다.
example_en: That new car is sick!

definition_en: A casual or familiar way to refer to a man, often used to address or describe someone in a friendly, neutral, or sometimes critical manner.
definition_ko: 남성을 친근하게 부를 때 쓰는 말로, 일상적이고 편한 표현입니다.
example_en: That guy over there is my friend.
example_ko: 저쪽에 있는 그 남자가 내 친구야.

definition_en: To deliberately lose a competition; also, to confuse or catch someone off guard
definition_ko: 경기에서 일부러 지거나, 누군가를 혼란스럽게 하는 행위를 의미합니다.
example_en: Don't throw the game on purpose!

definition_en: Have got to; must (informal contraction of 'got to')
definition_ko: 반드시 해야 하는 상황을 간단히 표현하는 비격식적 축약형입니다.
example_en: I gotta finish my homework soon.

definition_en: To stop dwelling on a past issue, person, or situation and proceed with life or new activities.
definition_ko: 과거를 잊고 새로운 시작이나 활동으로 나아가는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: It's time to move on from that mistake.
example_ko: 그 실수는 잊고 새 출발할 때야.

definition_en: A 'sub' refers to a subreddit, an online community or forum on Reddit dedicated to a specific topic or interest.
definition_ko: 레딧의 특정 주제 또는 관심사를 다루는 온라인 커뮤니티를 의미합니다.
example_en: Check out this funny sub on Reddit.

definition_en: Short for 'picture,' used to refer to photos or images shared online, often in chat or social media contexts.
definition_ko: 사진이나 이미지를 의미하며, 온라인에서 공유할 때 자주 쓰입니다.
example_en: Did you see her new pic on Insta?

definition_en: Used to describe something as the highest point, most intense, or most impressive, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.
definition_ko: 가장 높거나 강렬하거나 인상적인 상태를 과장되게 표현할 때 사용한다.
example_en: That concert was peak!

definition_en: A casual or dismissive way of saying 'no' or 'not really,' often used to reject, disagree, or indicate a lack of interest.
definition_ko: '아니' 또는 '별로'라는 의미로, 거절하거나 관심이 없음을 간단히 표현한다.
example_en: Want to go out tonight? Nah, I'm tired.

definition_en: Feeling extremely amused or overwhelmed, often to the point of being unable to respond, or describing something as very funny or impressive.
definition_ko: 매우 웃기거나 감탄할 만한 상황에서 '완전 웃기다' 또는 '대단하다'는 의미로 사용된다.
example_en: That joke had me dead!

definition_en: Laughing My F***ing Ass Off; expressing intense amusement
definition_ko: 엄청나게 웃기거나 재밌을 때 '미친 듯이 웃는다'는 의미의 약어이다.
example_en: That video made me lmfao!

definition_en: Used to describe someone or something that is admirable, authentic, or confidently true to their beliefs or identity, often in a way that is unapologetically genuine.
definition_ko: 자신의 신념이나 정체성에 충실하고 진실된 사람이나 것을 칭찬하거나 인정할 때 쓰인다.
example_en: He's so based for speaking his mind.

definition_en: You all; informal plural second-person pronoun addressing a group
definition_ko: 여러 사람을 부를 때 쓰는 비격식 복수 2인칭 대명사.
example_en: Y'all coming to the party?

definition_en: Something that causes feelings of embarrassment, awkwardness, or secondhand embarrassment, often considered socially awkward or embarrassing to witness.
definition_ko: 어색하거나 민망한 상황, 또는 그런 감정을 느끼게 하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: That comment was so cringe.

definition_en: Excited buzz or exaggerated enthusiasm about something, often overhyped or overly promoted.
definition_ko: 어떤 것에 대한 과도한 기대감이나 흥분, 과장된 홍보를 의미한다.
example_en: Everyone's hyped for the new game.
example_ko: 모두 새 게임 기대 엄청 하네.

definition_en: Refers to poorly made or low-quality content, often produced by AI or in a dismissive context, implying it is sloppy, unoriginal, or lacking in effort.
definition_ko: 형편없거나 저질의 콘텐츠를 비하하거나 조롱하는 표현.
example_en: This AI art is total slop.

definition_en: Used to indicate approximation or a rough estimate, suggesting something is somewhat or vaguely like the described amount or quality.
definition_ko: 대략 또는 애매한 정도를 나타내며, 정확하지 않음을 표현한다.
example_en: It's cold-ish today, not too bad.
example_ko: 오늘 좀 쌀쌀한데, 그리 심하지 않아.

definition_en: Used to express strong agreement, affirmation, or emphasis in casual conversation.
definition_ko: 강한 동의 또는 확신을 나타내는 표현.
example_en: I totally agree with your idea!

definition_en: In slang, 'fire' means something that is extremely good, impressive, or exciting, often used to describe entertainment, performance, or quality. It can also refer to being highly energetic or passionate about something.
definition_ko: 엄청 좋거나 인상적인 것, 흥미롭거나 열정적인 상태를 표현하는 속어.
example_en: That new song is fire!

definition_en: Used to emphasize sincerity, seriousness, or genuine concern in a statement, often to highlight frustration or importance.
definition_ko: 진지함이나 중요성을 강조할 때 사용하는 표현, 때로는 짜증이나 답답함을 나타냄.
example_en: Are you serious about quitting?

definition_en: An intensifier used to express strong emotion or emphasis, similar to 'very' or 'really,' often conveying excitement, admiration, or frustration.
definition_ko: 강한 감정이나 강조를 나타내는 부사로, 흥분, 감탄, 짜증 등을 표현할 때 사용됨.
example_en: That movie was freaking awesome!

definition_en: Reliable, good, or impressive in quality or performance.
definition_ko: 신뢰할 만하거나 훌륭한 품질이나 성과를 나타내는 표현.
example_en: Your performance was solid tonight.

definition_en: To understand, comprehend, or agree with something being said or experienced.
definition_ko: 이해하거나 동의하는 것을 의미하는 표현.
example_en: Do you get it now?

definition_en: In online communication, 'pm' is used as a verb meaning to send a private message or direct message to someone.
definition_ko: 온라인에서 'pm'은 누군가에게 비공개 메시지 또는 다이렉트 메시지를 보내는 행위를 의미하는 동사로 사용됩니다.
example_en: I'll pm you the details later.

definition_en: An expression of indifference, boredom, or lack of enthusiasm about something.
definition_ko: 무관심, 지루함 또는 열정이 없음을 표현하는 감정입니다.
example_en: The party was meh, honestly.

definition_en: Refers to someone or something that is considered very bad, worthless, or inferior in quality or performance.
definition_ko: 매우 나쁘거나 쓸모없거나 열등하다고 여겨지는 사람이나 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: That game was trash.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is mediocre, average, or not particularly impressive.
definition_ko: 평범하거나 평균적이거나 특별히 인상적이지 않은 것을 묘사할 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: The movie was mid, not bad but not great.
example_ko: 그 영화 평범했어, 별로 특별하진 않았어.

definition_en: Pretending to be someone else online, often to deceive or scam others, especially in social or dating contexts.
definition_ko: 온라인에서 다른 사람인 척 가장하거나 속이기 위해 거짓 신분을 꾸미는 행위입니다.
example_en: He was caught catfishing online.

definition_en: A humorous or viral image, video, or piece of content shared online, often low-effort or repetitive, used to convey jokes or ideas within a community.
definition_ko: 유머러스하거나 바이럴된 이미지, 영상 또는 온라인에서 공유되는 콘텐츠로, 농담이나 아이디어를 전달하는 데 사용됩니다.
example_en: Did you see that funny meme?

definition_en: Used to emphasize honesty, sincerity, or certainty about a statement, often in informal or online contexts.
definition_ko: 진실됨이나 확실성을 강조할 때 쓰는 표현으로, 비공식적이거나 온라인에서 자주 사용된다.
example_en: I swear I didn't do it.

definition_en: Used to emphasize honesty, certainty, or that something is straightforward and genuine.
definition_ko: 정직하거나 확실함을 강조하거나, 솔직하고 직설적임을 나타낼 때 사용한다.
example_en: That was straight up amazing!

definition_en: To leave or exit a situation quickly, often after completing a task or when feeling done with something.
definition_ko: 빨리 떠나거나 상황에서 벗어나는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: It's late, I gotta bounce.

definition_en: To work persistently and tirelessly at a task, often in gaming or online contexts, to achieve a goal or improve one's status.
definition_ko: 목표를 달성하거나 실력을 키우기 위해 끈질기게 노력하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: I need to grind to level up.

definition_en: Used to mean a large amount or a lot of something, emphasizing abundance or quantity.
definition_ko: 많은 양이나 다량을 의미하며, 풍부함이나 양을 강조할 때 사용한다.
example_en: I have tons of homework today.

definition_en: Sending unsolicited or repetitive messages, posts, or invites online, often to promote or disrupt a community.
definition_ko: 원치 않거나 반복적인 메시지, 게시물, 초대 등을 온라인에서 보내는 행위로, 커뮤니티를 방해하거나 홍보하는 목적으로 사용된다.
example_en: Stop spamming the chat!

definition_en: Short for 'because,' used informally in speech or writing to explain reasons or causes, often in casual or conversational contexts.
definition_ko: ‘because’의 줄임말로, 이유나 원인을 설명할 때 비격식적이고 대화체로 쓰인다.
example_en: I'm tired cuz I didn't sleep well.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is overwhelming, excessive, or difficult to handle, often implying annoyance or fatigue.
definition_ko: 압도적이거나 과도하거나 감당하기 어려운 상태를 묘사하며, 짜증이나 피로를 암시할 때 사용한다.
example_en: This workload is too much.

definition_en: Used to express approval, excitement, or that something is excellent or impressive.
definition_ko: 좋거나 멋지거나 인상적일 때 감탄이나 찬사를 표현하는 말이다.
example_en: That new phone is so sweet!

definition_en: Used to describe someone or something that is the best, most dominant, or highly respected in a particular context.
definition_ko: 가장 뛰어나거나 존경받는 사람이나 것을 의미한다.
example_en: She's the king of baking in our group.

definition_en: In slang, 'snap' can refer to sending a quick message or photo via social media or messaging apps, especially on platforms like Snapchat, or to the act of quickly capturing or reacting to something.
definition_ko: 소셜 미디어나 메시징 앱에서 빠르게 메시지나 사진을 보내거나, 빠르게 포착하거나 반응하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: I just snapped a quick pic of the sunset.

definition_en: Vibe refers to the overall mood, atmosphere, or feeling of a situation, environment, or person, often used to describe whether it’s positive, negative, or specific in tone.
definition_ko: 상황이나 환경, 사람의 분위기나 느낌을 나타내며, 긍정적이거나 부정적인 감정을 표현한다.
example_en: I love the chill vibe at that cafe.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is boring, uninteresting, or disappointing.
definition_ko: 지루하거나 기대에 못 미치는 것, 또는 실망스러운 것을 의미한다.
example_en: That movie was so lame, I almost fell asleep.
example_ko: 그 영화 너무 지루해서 거의 졸 뻔했어.

definition_en: Used to suggest possibility or uncertainty about a statement or situation, often implying hesitation or speculation.
definition_ko: 확실하지 않거나 가능성을 시사하며, 망설임이나 추측을 나타낸다.
example_en: Maybe we can hang out later if you're free.
example_ko: 나중에 시간 되면 같이 놀 수도 있겠네.

definition_en: To send unsolicited or repetitive messages, posts, or content online, often to promote or annoy, or to flood a platform with such content.
definition_ko: 원치 않거나 반복적인 메시지, 게시물 등을 온라인에서 보내는 행위로, 홍보하거나 짜증나게 할 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: I keep getting spam messages on my phone.
example_ko: 내 휴대폰에 스팸 메시지가 계속 와.

definition_en: Used to emphasize that something is genuine, impressive, or true; often means 'really' or 'truly.'
definition_ko: 무언가가 진짜이거나 인상적임을 강조할 때 사용하며, '정말' 또는 '진짜'라는 의미입니다.
example_en: That concert was legit amazing!

definition_en: An informal way of admitting a mistake or taking responsibility for an error.
definition_ko: 실수나 잘못을 인정하는 비공식적인 표현입니다.
example_en: Sorry I forgot your birthday, my bad.

definition_en: Feeling exhausted, defeated, or no longer capable of handling a situation; often used to describe someone who is mentally or physically worn out or a situation that is beyond repair.
definition_ko: 지치거나 패배했거나 더 이상 상황을 처리할 수 없음을 의미하며, 정신적 또는 육체적으로 지친 상태를 표현합니다.
example_en: After that long hike, I was totally cooked.
example_ko: 그 긴 하이킹 끝나고 완전히 지쳤어.

definition_en: To spend time relaxing or socializing with others, either casually or informally, often implying hanging out in a relaxed setting.
definition_ko: 편하게 시간을 보내거나 사교 활동을 하는 것을 의미하며, 느긋하게 어울리는 상황을 나타냅니다.
example_en: Let's hang out this weekend.

definition_en: A 'banger' is a highly impressive, exciting, or enjoyable song, event, or piece of content that stands out as particularly good or memorable.
definition_ko: 특히 인상적이고 신나는 노래나 이벤트를 가리키는 말입니다.
example_en: That new song is a total banger!
example_ko: 그 새 노래 진짜 신나고 좋아!

definition_en: A contraction of 'let me,' used informally to mean 'let me' when requesting to do something or to express a desire to check or see something.
definition_ko: 'let me'의 줄임말로, 부탁하거나 확인할 때 쓰입니다.
example_en: Lemme check my schedule first.

definition_en: To 'ship' means to support or wish for a romantic relationship between two characters, often in fandom or online communities.
definition_ko: 팬덤이나 온라인 커뮤니티에서 두 캐릭터의 로맨스 관계를 지지하거나 바라는 것.
example_en: I totally ship those two characters.
example_ko: 그 두 캐릭터 정말 잘 어울린다고 생각해.

definition_en: Bait refers to content or actions designed to provoke reactions, manipulate opinions, or lure others into responding, often used to describe intentionally provocative posts or tactics.
definition_ko: 반응을 유도하거나 조작하거나 유인하기 위해 의도적으로 도발적인 콘텐츠나 행동.
example_en: That post is just bait for reactions.
example_ko: 그 게시물은 반응 유도용인 것 같아.

definition_en: Something that is disgusting, unpleasant, or morally or socially unacceptable.
definition_ko: 역겹거나 불쾌하거나 도덕적·사회적으로 용납되지 않는 것.
example_en: That food looks gross.

definition_en: Extremely good, impressive, or the best at something; often used to praise someone's performance or quality.
definition_ko: 매우 뛰어나거나 인상적이거나 최고의 상태를 의미하며, 누군가의 성과나 품질을 칭찬할 때 사용.
example_en: Her performance was goated!

definition_en: IRL stands for 'in real life,' referring to the physical world outside of online or virtual environments.
definition_ko: 온라인 또는 가상 환경 밖의 현실 세계를 의미하는 'in real life'의 약어.
example_en: I met my online friend IRL yesterday.

definition_en: Very; a lot; extremely (Bay Area/California slang, now widespread)
definition_ko: 매우, 많이, 극도로를 의미하는 베이 지역/캘리포니아 속어로, 지금은 널리 퍼짐.
example_en: That party was hella fun!

definition_en: Used to describe something that is very good, impressive, or cool.
definition_ko: 매우 멋지고 인상적인 것을 표현할 때 쓰는 말.
example_en: Your new sneakers are dope!

definition_en: A person who intentionally posts provocative, offensive, or disruptive comments online to upset others or provoke reactions.
definition_ko: 의도적으로 도발적이거나 불쾌한 댓글을 올려 다른 사람을 자극하는 사람.
example_en: That guy is just trolling in the chat to get reactions.
example_ko: 그 사람은 반응을 끌어내려고 채팅에서 일부러 도발하는 거야.

definition_en: To contact or reach out to someone, often via message or communication, or to experience a sudden impact or effect.
definition_ko: 누군가에게 연락하거나 메시지를 보내는 것, 또는 갑작스러운 영향이나 효과를 경험하는 것.
example_en: I tried to hit her up yesterday, but she didn't reply.
example_ko: 어제 그녀한테 연락하려고 했는데 답이 없었어.

definition_en: An alternative or secondary version of a person, account, or identity, often used to describe a different persona, style, or purpose separate from the main one.
definition_ko: 본 계정과 별개로 사용하는 다른 계정이나 페르소나.
example_en: I have an alt account for testing new games.
example_ko: 새 게임 테스트용으로 다른 계정을 만들어 놨어.

definition_en: Short for 'collaboration,' referring to a joint project or partnership between artists, brands, or entities, often used in entertainment and gaming contexts.
definition_ko: 아티스트, 브랜드 등이 함께 작업하는 협업을 의미.
example_en: The artists are doing a collab on this new track.
example_ko: 그 아티스트들이 이번 신곡에서 함께 작업하는 중이야.

definition_en: A derogatory term for someone who is foolish, incompetent, or deserving of ridicule, often used to insult or mock others online.
definition_ko: 어리석거나 무능하다고 여겨지는 사람을 조롱하는 말.
example_en: He forgot his lines again, total clown move.
example_ko: 그는 또 대사를 잊어버렸어, 정말 바보 같은 짓이야.

definition_en: Content intentionally designed to provoke anger or strong reactions, often used to manipulate viewers or generate engagement online.
definition_ko: 분노를 유발하는 콘텐츠로, 온라인에서 논란을 일으키거나 관심을 끌기 위해 제작됨.
example_en: That video is just ragebait to get views.
example_ko: 그 영상은 시청자를 자극하려고 만든 논란용 콘텐츠야.

definition_en: Somewhat; to some extent but not entirely; kind of
definition_ko: 어느 정도는 맞지만 완전히 그렇지 않은 상태를 나타내는 표현.
example_en: I'm sort of tired after a long day.

definition_en: Suspicious; behaving in a sketchy or untrustworthy way
definition_ko: 수상하거나 믿기 어려운 행동을 하는 사람을 가리킵니다.
example_en: His story sounds kinda sus to me.
example_ko: 그 사람 이야기 좀 수상하게 들려.

definition_en: A contraction of 'out of,' used informally to mean 'should' or 'ought to,' or to express that someone is supposed to do something or that something is expected.
definition_ko: 'out of'의 축약형으로, '해야 한다'거나 '해야 할 것 같다'는 의미로 쓰입니다.
example_en: You should outta try this new game, it's fun.
example_ko: 이 새 게임 꼭 해봐야 해, 재밌거든.

definition_en: In slang, 'meta' refers to the current dominant strategy, trend, or best approach within a specific context, such as gaming or online discussions.
definition_ko: 특정 맥락에서 현재 가장 유행하거나 효과적인 전략이나 트렌드를 의미합니다.
example_en: The current meta in this game is all about sniping.
example_ko: 이 게임의 현재 전략은 모두 저격이야.

definition_en: Used to describe something as extremely impressive, crazy, or overwhelming, or to express frustration or annoyance.
definition_ko: 엄청나게 인상적이거나 미친 듯이 강렬한 것을 표현하거나 짜증을 나타낼 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: That concert was nuts! So good!
example_ko: 그 콘서트 진짜 대박이었어! 너무 좋았어.

definition_en: To accumulate or pile up multiple items, effects, or bonuses, often to enhance power or quantity in a game or context.
definition_ko: 여러 개의 아이템이나 효과를 쌓거나 모아 강화를 하는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: I managed to stack up a lot of coins in the game.

definition_en: A humorous or dismissive way to suggest that someone's failure or mistake is due to their lack of skill or ability.
definition_ko: 실패나 실수의 원인을 능력 부족으로 치부하는 농담 또는 무시하는 표현.
example_en: You lost again? Must be a skill issue.
example_ko: 또 졌네? 실력 문제인 것 같아.

definition_en: Feeling emotionally upset, angry, or overwhelmed, often as a reaction to a specific comment, situation, or stimulus, sometimes leading to a strong or exaggerated response.
definition_ko: 특정 자극에 감정적으로 격앙되거나 화나는 상태.
example_en: She got triggered by that comment.

definition_en: Props is slang for giving someone recognition, praise, or respect for their effort or achievement.
definition_ko: 누군가의 노력이나 성과를 인정하거나 칭찬하는 말.
example_en: Props for finishing that project so quickly!
example_ko: 그 프로젝트 빨리 끝낸 거 칭찬할 만해!

definition_en: Being 'cracked' means being very funny, highly skilled, or performing exceptionally well at something, or in some contexts, being defeated or overwhelmed.
definition_ko: 아주 웃기거나 뛰어난 실력을 보여줄 때 쓰는 표현입니다.
example_en: That comedian is cracked, so funny!
example_ko: 저 코미디언 진짜 웃기다, 완전 대박이야.

definition_en: Used to mean 'until' or 'up to' a certain point in time or extent, often in casual online communication.
definition_ko: 'until'의 줄임말로, 온라인에서 시간이나 범위를 나타낼 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: I'll be here til midnight.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is impressive, extraordinary, or highly memorable, often with a sense of excitement or intensity.
definition_ko: 인상적이거나 매우 기억에 남는 것을 표현하는 감탄사입니다.
example_en: That game boss fight was epic!

definition_en: RNG (random number generator) refers to the element of luck or chance in games or situations where outcomes are unpredictable and depend on randomness, often leading to frustration or unpredictability.
definition_ko: 게임이나 상황에서 운이나 확률에 의존하는 요소를 의미합니다.
example_en: The loot drop was all RNG luck.

definition_en: A beginner or inexperienced person, often used to describe someone new to a game, activity, or skill.
definition_ko: 초보자 또는 경험이 부족한 사람을 가리키며, 주로 게임이나 활동에서 새내기를 의미한다.
example_en: Don't worry if you're a noob, everyone starts somewhere.

definition_en: To lie or exaggerate; often used in 'no cap' meaning 'for real, no lie'
definition_ko: 거짓말하거나 과장하는 것을 의미하며, 'no cap'은 '진짜로' 또는 '거짓말 아니야'라는 의미로 쓰인다.
example_en: No cap, I really did finish all my homework.
example_ko: 진짜로, 숙제 다 끝냈어, 거짓말 아니야.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is astonishing, impressive, or hard to believe, often conveying a sense of being extraordinary or overwhelming.
definition_ko: 놀랍거나 믿기 힘든 것을 표현할 때 쓰이며, 비범하거나 압도적인 감정을 나타낸다.
example_en: That concert was unreal, I can't believe it happened!
example_ko: 그 콘서트 진짜 대단했어, 믿기 힘들었어.

definition_en: Referring to something or someone that is suspicious, untrustworthy, or morally questionable.
definition_ko: 의심스럽거나 믿기 어려운 사람이나 사물, 또는 도덕적으로 의심스러운 것을 의미한다.
example_en: That deal sounds shady, be careful.
example_ko: 그 거래 좀 의심스러워, 조심해야 해.

definition_en: To attempt to deal with or justify a difficult or uncomfortable situation, often in a way that is seen as insufficient or delusional.
definition_ko: 어려운 상황을 견디거나 해결하려고 노력하는 것을 의미하며, 때로는 부족하거나 비현실적이라고 여겨질 때도 있다.
example_en: I'm trying to cope with all this stress lately.
example_ko: 요즘 스트레스 잘 견디려고 애쓰고 있어.

definition_en: Used to describe something as worthless, poor quality, or disappointing, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.
definition_ko: 가치 없거나 형편없는 것을 비하하거나 조롱하는 표현이다.
example_en: This movie was garbage, I wasted two hours.
example_ko: 이 영화 완전 형편없었어, 두 시간 날렸어.

definition_en: A strong, informal way of saying 'no' or expressing refusal or rejection with emphasis.
definition_ko: 강한 부정이나 거절을 강조하는 표현이다.
example_en: Are you going skydiving? Hell no!
example_ko: 스카이다이빙 하러 간다고? 절대 안 가!

definition_en: A casual term for a close friend or buddy, often used to address someone in an informal, friendly manner.
definition_ko: 친한 친구 또는 동료를 친근하게 부르는 말입니다.
example_en: What's up, homie? Long time no see!

definition_en: To suddenly cut off all contact with someone and ignore them completely, especially in a dating context
definition_ko: 연락을 갑자기 끊거나 무시하는 행동으로, 특히 데이트 상황에서 상대방과의 연락을 끊는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: She ghosted me after our date.

definition_en: A combination of two or more things, such as moves, cards, or elements, that work together to create a powerful or impressive effect.
definition_ko: 두 가지 이상이 조합되어 강력하거나 인상적인 효과를 내는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: His combo move in the game was amazing!
example_ko: 그의 게임 콤보 기술 진짜 멋졌어!

definition_en: To publicly criticize, challenge, or point out someone's mistake, behavior, or statement, often in a confrontational or assertive manner.
definition_ko: 공개적으로 비판하거나 문제를 지적하는 행동을 의미한다.
example_en: She called out his lie in front of everyone.
example_ko: 그녀가 모두 앞에서 그의 거짓말을 지적했어.

definition_en: An expression of disgust, repulsion, or strong dislike towards something.
definition_ko: 혐오감이나 강한 싫음을 표현하는 감탄사이다.
example_en: Ew, this food tastes weird.

definition_en: A person who criticizes, dislikes, or expresses negative opinions about someone or something, often without constructive purpose.
definition_ko: 무언가를 비판하거나 싫어하며 부정적인 의견을 내는 사람을 의미한다.
example_en: Ignore the haters and keep doing your thing.
example_ko: 싫어하는 사람들 신경 쓰지 말고 계속 해.

definition_en: A 'pick me' is someone who seeks approval or validation from others, often by displaying behavior that aims to stand out or be favored, sometimes to gain social acceptance or avoid criticism.
definition_ko: 남들의 인정이나 승인을 얻기 위해 과시하거나 눈에 띄려고 하는 사람을 가리킨다.
example_en: She always acts like a pick me to get attention.
example_ko: 그녀는 항상 관심 받으려고 과시하는 척 해.

definition_en: A deliberately low-quality, absurd, or humorous post made online, often to entertain or provoke reactions, sometimes considered pointless or nonsensical.
definition_ko: 의도적으로 저퀄리티이거나 엉뚱하거나 유머러스한 온라인 게시물로, 주로 재미를 위해 올린다.
example_en: That meme was just a funny shitpost.
example_ko: 그 밈은 그냥 웃긴 엉터리 게시물이었어.

definition_en: A term used to describe someone or something that is impressive, cool, or admirable, often implying a sense of toughness or confidence.
definition_ko: 멋지고 강인하며 자신감 넘치는 사람이나 것을 표현할 때 쓰는 말이다.
example_en: You handled that situation like a badass.

definition_en: Telling someone to go outside and get some fresh air or to take a break from online activity, often used to suggest they need to relax or gain perspective.
definition_ko: 밖에 나가서 신선한 공기를 마시거나 휴식을 취하라는 의미로, 온라인에서 피로하거나 과몰입한 사람에게 하는 말이다.
example_en: You've been online all day, go touch grass.
example_ko: 하루 종일 온라인만 했잖아, 밖에 나가서 좀 쉬어.

definition_en: An expression used to encourage, challenge, or express disbelief, often implying 'seriously?' or 'give me a break.'
definition_ko: 격려하거나 도전하거나 믿기 어려울 때 내는 표현으로, '진짜?' 또는 '제발'의 의미를 담고 있다.
example_en: Come on, you can do better than that!
example_ko: 제발, 너 좀 더 잘할 수 있잖아!

definition_en: Okay, okay; casual affirmative response, slightly warmer than 'ok'
definition_ko: 괜찮아, 알겠어라는 의미의 간단한 긍정 표현으로, 'ok'보다 조금 더 따뜻한 느낌.
example_en: I'll see you tomorrow, kk.

definition_en: To improve, strengthen, or enhance something, often referring to game characters, abilities, or features, making them more effective or powerful.
definition_ko: 게임 캐릭터나 능력 등을 강화하거나 향상시키는 것.
example_en: They buffed the game to make characters stronger.
example_ko: 그들이 게임을 강화해서 캐릭터를 더 강하게 만들었어.

definition_en: A term used to praise someone for being exceptional, admirable, or iconic, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.
definition_ko: 특출나거나 존경받을 만한 사람을 칭찬하거나 과장해서 부르는 말.
example_en: He's a legend for scoring that goal!
example_ko: 그는 그 골 넣어서 전설이 됐어!

definition_en: Feeling irritated, annoyed, or bitter, often expressed through complaining or sarcasm, especially after a setback or disagreement.
definition_ko: 짜증나거나 화가 난 상태, 불만을 드러내는 표현.
example_en: He's so salty about losing the game, still complaining hours later.
example_ko: 그는 게임에서 진 것에 너무 짜증내서 몇 시간째 불평하고 있어.

definition_en: An exceptionally skilled, strong, or impressive person; to beast = to dominate or perform at an extraordinary level
definition_ko: 엄청나게 뛰어나거나 강력한 사람, 또는 뛰어난 성과를 내는 것.
example_en: She’s a beast on the basketball court, scoring 30 points easily.
example_ko: 그녀는 농구장에서 엄청난 실력자로, 쉽게 30점이나 넣어.

definition_en: To weaken or reduce the effectiveness of a game element, character, or item, often through game updates or patches.
definition_ko: 게임 내 캐릭터나 아이템의 성능을 약화시키거나 줄이는 업데이트를 의미한다.
example_en: They nerfed the new update, so the character isn’t as powerful anymore.
example_ko: 그들은 업데이트로 캐릭터 성능을 약화시켜서 예전만큼 강하지 않게 됐어.

definition_en: A humorous or exaggerated term for the mental comfort or false hope someone clings to when facing disappointment or reality, often used online to mock wishful thinking.
definition_ko: 실망이나 현실에 직면했을 때 희망이나 위안을 찾는 행위를 풍자하거나 과장해서 부르는 말이다.
example_en: He’s just using copium to deal with the bad news, pretending everything’s fine.
example_ko: 그는 그냥 희망을 품으며 현실을 피하려고 copium을 쓰고 있어.

definition_en: A temporary malfunction or error in a digital system or game, often causing visual or functional issues.
definition_ko: 디지털 시스템이나 게임에서 일시적인 오류나 버그를 의미한다.
example_en: My game keeps glitching, so I can’t finish the level properly.
example_ko: 내 게임이 계속 버그가 나서 제대로 못 끝내겠어.

definition_en: Low key means something done in a subtle, understated, or relaxed manner, often implying a desire for discretion or minimal fuss.
definition_ko: 조용하고 은근하게 또는 겸손하게 무언가를 하는 방식을 의미한다.
example_en: I low key want to skip the party and stay home instead.
example_ko: 솔직히 말해서 파티 가기 싫고 집에 있고 싶어.

definition_en: To go ahead with an action or decision, often despite potential risks or doubts, implying a sense of daring or commitment.
definition_ko: 어떤 행동이나 결정을 망설임 없이 추진하라는 의미로, 도전 정신을 나타낸다.
example_en: Are you ready? Just send it and don’t overthink it.

definition_en: In online or informal contexts, 'aura' refers to a person's perceived charisma, presence, or vibe that influences how others feel about them or their actions.
definition_ko: 온라인이나 비공식적 맥락에서 '아우라'는 타인에게 영향을 미치는 카리스마나 존재감을 의미한다.
example_en: She has such a positive aura that everyone feels comfortable around her.
example_ko: 그녀는 정말 긍정적인 아우라가 있어서 모두가 편하게 느껴져.

definition_en: Used to emphasize that something is significant, impactful, or done to a great extent, often meaning 'a lot' or 'very much.'
definition_ko: 무언가가 크거나 강렬하다는 의미로 강조할 때 쓰인다.
example_en: That concert was big time, everyone loved it!
example_ko: 그 콘서트 정말 대단했어, 모두 좋아했어!

definition_en: In slang, 'serve' means to perform or deliver something with confidence, often in a sexual, competitive, or dominant context, or to be of service to someone in a submissive or obedient way.
definition_ko: 자신감 있게 무언가를 하거나 제공하는 것을 의미하며, 성적이거나 경쟁적 맥락에서도 쓰인다.
example_en: She served looks at the party, everyone was impressed.
example_ko: 그녀는 파티에서 멋지게 보여줬어, 모두 감탄했어.

definition_en: To show off, boast, or display something with pride, often to impress others or demonstrate status.
definition_ko: 자랑하거나 자랑스럽게 보여주는 것.
example_en: He loves to flex his new car on social media.
example_ko: 그는 새 차 자랑하는 걸 좋아해서 SNS에 자랑했어.

definition_en: Clout refers to influence, fame, or social status, especially gained or sought after for attention or validation, often on social media or in social circles.
definition_ko: 사회적 영향력이나 명성을 의미하며, 특히 SNS나 사회적 관계에서 인정받거나 주목받기 위해 추구하는 힘을 나타낸다.
example_en: Getting more followers gives him more clout online.

definition_en: Well; an exclamation expressing resignation or rueful acceptance of an awkward situation
definition_ko: 어쩔 수 없거나 아쉬운 상황에 대한 체념이나 유감의 표현이다.
example_en: Welp, I guess I missed the bus again.
example_ko: 어쩔 수 없네, 또 버스를 놓쳤어.

definition_en: An expression of disgust or aversion towards something or someone that makes you feel uncomfortable or repulsed.
definition_ko: 혐오감이나 불쾌감을 표현하는 감탄사로, 싫거나 불편한 것을 느낄 때 사용한다.
example_en: That smell is so bad, it makes me say 'ick'.
example_ko: 저 냄새 너무 구려서 '역겹다'라고 말하게 돼.

definition_en: A casual, informal way of saying 'alright' or 'okay,' often used to acknowledge or agree with something.
definition_ko: 편하고 비격식적인 '알았어' 또는 '괜찮아'라는 의미로, 동의하거나 인정할 때 사용한다.
example_en: Aight, I’ll see you tomorrow!

definition_en: Suspicious, questionable, or potentially dishonest; something that seems off or not quite right.
definition_ko: 의심스럽거나 믿기 어려운 상황을 의미하며, 뭔가 이상하거나 정직하지 않은 느낌이 든다.
example_en: That story sounds fishy, I don’t believe it.
example_ko: 그 이야기는 좀 이상한데, 믿기 어렵네.

definition_en: To perform, look, or do something with exceptional style and excellence; to absolutely nail it
definition_ko: 멋지고 뛰어나게 행동하거나 잘 해내는 것을 의미하며, 매우 인상적일 때 사용한다.
example_en: You slayed that presentation, everyone was impressed.
example_ko: 그 발표 정말 멋졌어, 모두 감탄했어.

definition_en: To join or start doing something quickly or casually, such as entering a chat, game, or activity.
definition_ko: 빠르게 또는 가볍게 어떤 활동에 참여하거나 시작하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: Hey, hop on the call when you’re ready.

definition_en: A fictional female character from anime or manga that someone has a strong affection for, often treated as a spouse or romantic partner by fans, especially in online communities.
definition_ko: 애니메이션이나 만화 속 여성 캐릭터를 애정이나 연인처럼 여기는 온라인 커뮤니티의 용어이다.
example_en: He’s obsessed with his waifu from that anime.
example_ko: 그는 그 애니메이션 속 와이프에 푹 빠졌어.

definition_en: A practical joke or mischievous act intended to surprise or amuse, often done in a playful or deceptive manner, sometimes with the intent to deceive or test boundaries.
definition_ko: 장난이나 속임수로 남을 놀라게 하거나 웃기기 위한 장난이다.
example_en: We played a prank on our friend by hiding his phone.
example_ko: 우리가 친구 핸드폰 숨기기 장난 쳤어.

definition_en: A person, typically a man, who is perceived as overly submissive or attentive to someone they are attracted to, often to the point of seeming desperate or foolish.
definition_ko: 호감이나 관심이 과도하게 지나쳐서 바보 같거나 비참하게 보이는 행동을 하는 사람을 의미한다.
example_en: Don't be a simp and just tell her how you feel.
example_ko: 호감 표현에 너무 집착하지 말고 솔직하게 말해.

definition_en: In slang, 'lag' refers to a delay or lagging response in digital devices, especially in gaming or streaming, caused by slow processing or network issues.
definition_ko: 게임이나 스트리밍에서 지연이나 끊김 현상을 의미한다.
example_en: Sorry for the lag, my internet is so slow today.
example_ko: 지연돼서 미안, 오늘 인터넷이 너무 느리네.

definition_en: Short for 'second,' used to briefly refer to a moment or a very short amount of time, often when asking for a pause or quick moment.
definition_ko: 짧은 시간이나 잠깐의 순간을 의미하는 약어로, 잠시 멈추거나 기다릴 때 쓴다.
example_en: Hold on a sec, I need to grab my phone.

definition_en: A term of endearment used to refer to a young girl or woman, often expressing affection or familiarity.
definition_ko: 애정을 담아 어린 여자나 여성에게 부르는 말이다.
example_en: You're my baby girl, always making me smile.
example_ko: 넌 내 사랑스러운 여자야, 항상 웃게 만들어.

definition_en: Extremely crazy, insane, or unbelievable; often used to describe something that is wild or overwhelming.
definition_ko: 아주 미친 듯이 이상하거나 믿기 어려운 상태를 표현한다.
example_en: That party was bonkers, so crazy!
example_ko: 그 파티 정말 미쳤어, 너무 재밌었어!

definition_en: Engaging in persistent, repetitive effort or activity, often to achieve a goal like leveling up in a game or working hard at something.
definition_ko: 목표를 위해 끈질기게 반복적으로 노력하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: I've been grinding all night to finish this project.
example_ko: 이 프로젝트 끝내려고 밤새 열심히 했어.

definition_en: Informal term for gossip, secrets, or juicy information shared among friends or online communities.
definition_ko: 친구나 온라인 커뮤니티에서 공유하는 가십, 비밀, 흥미로운 정보이다.
example_en: Spill the tea about what happened yesterday!
example_ko: 어제 일 얘기 좀 알려줘, 궁금해.

definition_en: Stylish or fashionable clothing and accessories; to have great personal style
definition_ko: 멋지고 세련된 옷차림이나 액세서리를 의미한다.
example_en: Her outfit is so drip today!

definition_en: To spend time casually with friends or others in a relaxed setting, often without a specific plan or purpose.
definition_ko: 친구들과 편하게 시간을 보내는 것을 의미하며, 특별한 계획 없이 여유롭게 노는 것을 말합니다.
example_en: Let's hang out this weekend and catch up.
example_ko: 이번 주말에 같이 놀자, 이야기 좀 하자.

definition_en: Used to express that something is the best choice, successful, or highly effective in a given context.
definition_ko: 무언가가 최고의 선택이거나 성공적임을 나타내는 표현입니다.
example_en: Pizza for the win when you're hungry!

definition_en: A casual or emphatic way of saying 'no' or expressing disagreement, often used to reject or dismiss something.
definition_ko: 거절하거나 반대할 때 사용하는 비격식적 표현입니다.
example_en: Naw, I don't want to go out tonight.

definition_en: Feeling mentally exhausted, overwhelmed, or mentally 'burned out'; also can describe something that is damaged or overused.
definition_ko: 정신적으로 피곤하거나 과로한 상태를 의미하며, 손상되거나 과도하게 사용된 상태를 비유하기도 합니다.
example_en: I'm totally fried after that long day.
example_ko: 그 긴 하루 끝나고 완전 피곤해.

definition_en: Definitely (British/Australian informal abbreviation)
definition_ko: 확실히, 반드시라는 의미의 영국/호주식 비격식 약어입니다.
example_en: That movie was defo the best of the year.

definition_en: Refers to something supernatural, ominous, or possessing negative, uncontrollable, or dangerous energy, often used to describe things that feel cursed or haunted in a metaphorical or literal sense.
definition_ko: 초자연적이거나 불길한 기운이 있다고 느껴지는 것, 또는 저주받았거나 귀신 들린 것 같은 느낌을 표현할 때 쓰인다.
example_en: This haunted house feels so cursed.
example_ko: 이 유령의 집 정말 저주받은 것 같아.

definition_en: Used to describe something of poor quality, disappointing, or unsatisfactory.
definition_ko: 품질이 나쁘거나 기대에 못 미치는 것을 표현할 때 쓰는 말.
example_en: This phone is so crappy, it keeps freezing.
example_ko: 이 폰 진짜 형편없어, 계속 멈춰.

definition_en: A casual or dismissive way of saying 'no' or indicating disagreement or refusal.
definition_ko: '아니' 또는 '절대 아니야'라는 의미로, 거절이나 반대를 가볍게 표현하는 말.
example_en: Did you eat my snack? Nuh uh!

definition_en: Feeling very excited, pleased, or enthusiastic about something.
definition_ko: 무언가에 대해 매우 흥분하거나 기뻐하는 감정을 표현하는 말.
example_en: I'm so stoked for the concert tonight!
example_ko: 오늘 밤 콘서트 기대돼서 너무 신나!

definition_en: A mild intensifier used to express strong emotion, excitement, or emphasis in informal speech.
definition_ko: 강한 감정이나 흥분을 표현하는 부드러운 강조어로, 감탄이나 놀람을 나타낼 때 사용한다.
example_en: That was a freakin' awesome game!

definition_en: A 'rip off' refers to something that is overpriced, unfair, or a scam, often implying that the buyer is being cheated or overcharged.
definition_ko: 가격이 비싸거나 사기성 있는 것을 의미하며, 사기당하거나 과도하게 가격이 책정된 것을 가리킨다.
example_en: That shirt was a rip off, so expensive!
example_ko: 그 셔츠 너무 비싸서 사기 같았어.

definition_en: A strong romantic or infatuation feeling towards someone, often unreciprocated or in the early stages of attraction.
definition_ko: 누군가에 대한 강한 로맨틱한 감정이나 짝사랑을 의미한다.
example_en: I have a crush on her but I’m too shy to tell.

definition_en: A random person encountered online or in real life, often someone unknown or not personally significant.
definition_ko: 온라인이나 현실에서 만난 무작위 사람, 별로 중요하지 않은 사람.
example_en: I met some rando online who gave me weird advice.
example_ko: 온라인에서 만난 무작위 사람이 이상한 조언을 해줬어.

definition_en: A casual, informal way of saying 'sort of' or 'somewhat,' often used to express approximation, uncertainty, or a mild degree of something.
definition_ko: 대략적이거나 애매한 정도를 나타내는 말.
example_en: I'm sorta tired, so I might skip the party.
example_ko: 좀 피곤해서 파티는 못 갈 것 같아.

definition_en: For the win; used to express enthusiasm, support, or endorsement
definition_ko: 승리를 위해 또는 강한 지지와 응원을 표현하는 말이다.
example_en: Chocolate ice cream is the best, ftw!

definition_en: Referring to someone, often a teenager, who adopts provocative, rebellious, or dark themes to appear more daring or mature, often in a way that is considered superficial or attention-seeking.
definition_ko: 반항적이거나 어둡고 도발적인 태도를 취하는 사람을 가리키며, 때로는 피상적이거나 관심을 끌기 위한 행동으로 여겨진다.
example_en: He’s so edgy with his dark clothes and piercings.
example_ko: 그는 검은 옷과 피어싱으로 아주 반항적이야.

definition_en: Feeling annoyed, frustrated, or tired of something to the point of wanting change or to stop dealing with it.
definition_ko: 무언가에 지치거나 짜증나서 더 이상 참기 힘든 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: I'm fed up with this rain, I want sunshine!
example_ko: 이 비에 지쳤어, 맑은 날이 보고 싶어!

definition_en: Exciting, fun, or excellent; full of energy and enjoyment
definition_ko: 흥미롭거나 재미있거나 멋진 상태를 의미하며, 에너지와 즐거움이 넘치는 것을 표현한다.
example_en: That concert was so lit, I had a great time!
example_ko: 그 콘서트 정말 멋졌어, 정말 즐거웠어!

definition_en: A shortened form of 'favorite,' used to refer to something or someone that is preferred or liked the most.
definition_ko: 가장 좋아하거나 선호하는 것을 의미하는 'favorite'의 줄임말이다.
example_en: This song is my fave right now.
example_ko: 이 노래 지금 내가 제일 좋아하는 곡이야.

definition_en: "See ya" is an informal way of saying goodbye or see you later, often used casually in conversation or online chats.
definition_ko: 작별 인사로, 나중에 보자거나 안녕이라는 의미의 비격식적 표현.
example_en: Gotta go now, see ya tomorrow!

definition_en: Referring to something that is cheesy, overly sentimental, or awkwardly outdated, often causing it to be perceived as unoriginal or embarrassing.
definition_ko: 진부하거나 유치하고 어색한 것, 때로는 구식이거나 감성적이어서 웃기거나 민망하게 느껴지는 것.
example_en: That joke was so corny, but I laughed anyway.

definition_en: To perform or present something with intense effort, impact, or excellence, often emphasizing going all out or being impressive.
definition_ko: 최선을 다하거나 강렬하게 임하는 것, 또는 인상적이거나 힘 있게 하는 것.
example_en: She went hard on her presentation, it was impressive.
example_ko: 그녀는 발표를 정말 열심히 했어, 인상적이었어.

definition_en: A vague or generic term used to refer to an object, device, or concept when the specific name is unknown, forgotten, or unnecessary.
definition_ko: 구체적인 이름을 모를 때 또는 필요 없을 때 대충 가리키는 말.
example_en: Can you pass me that thingy over there?

definition_en: In slang, 'trend' refers to a popular or prevailing style, behavior, or phenomenon that is currently gaining attention or becoming widespread.
definition_ko: 현재 인기 있거나 유행하는 스타일, 행동, 현상.
example_en: Wearing oversized hoodies is the latest trend.
example_ko: 오버사이즈 후드티 입는 게 요즘 유행이야.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is excessive, overwhelming, or a little too intense, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.
definition_ko: 과하거나 너무 강하거나 부담스러운 상태를 유머러스하게 표현.
example_en: Her outfit was a bit much for a casual day.
example_ko: 그녀 옷차림이 평범한 날에는 좀 과했어.

definition_en: To fall asleep quickly or unexpectedly, often after exertion or in a casual context.
definition_ko: 피곤하거나 지친 상태에서 갑자기 또는 쉽게 잠들 때 사용하는 표현이다.
example_en: I was so tired I crashed out on the couch.

definition_en: Used to express agreement, acceptance, or that something is okay or satisfactory, often in a casual or laid-back manner.
definition_ko: 무언가에 동의하거나 수용하거나 괜찮거나 만족스럽다는 의미를 캐주얼하게 표현할 때 쓴다.
example_en: Yeah, that’s alright with me.

definition_en: To abandon, leave behind, or skip; to ditch class = to skip school
definition_ko: 약속이나 장소를 버리거나 떠나거나 건너뛰는 것을 의미하며, 학교를 건너뛰는 것도 포함된다.
example_en: Let's ditch class and go to the mall.

definition_en: Shade is a subtle or indirect insult, criticism, or disapproval expressed through comments or behavior, often delivered in a witty or sneaky manner.
definition_ko: 간접적이거나 은근한 비판이나 깎아내리기를 재치 있게 표현하는 말.
example_en: She threw shade at her ex during the party.
example_ko: 그녀는 파티에서 전 남친에게 은근히 비꼬았어.

definition_en: A humorous or dismissive term for someone who is delusional, overly optimistic, or holding unrealistic beliefs, especially in online contexts.
definition_ko: 비현실적이거나 망상에 빠진 사람을 농담조로 부르는 말.
example_en: He's so delulu thinking they’re dating.
example_ko: 그는 그들이 사귀는 거라고 망상하는 것 같아.

definition_en: Ghosting refers to suddenly cutting off all communication with someone without explanation, often in dating or social contexts.
definition_ko: 갑자기 연락을 끊거나 무시하는 행동, 주로 데이트나 소셜 관계에서 사용.
example_en: He’s been ghosting me after our date.

definition_en: To be an extremely dedicated and passionate fan of a particular celebrity, character, or interest, often to an obsessive degree.
definition_ko: 특정 연예인이나 관심사에 매우 열성적이고 헌신적인 팬.
example_en: I stan that singer so much!

definition_en: Extremely disappointed or upset about something; emotionally drained or devastated.
definition_ko: 큰 실망이나 충격을 받은 상태.
example_en: I was gutted when I missed the concert last night.
example_ko: 어제 콘서트 못 간 게 너무 실망했어.

definition_en: A person who aspires to be like someone else or to achieve a certain status, but is often seen as insincere or inferior in their imitation.
definition_ko: 남을 흉내 내거나 특정 지위를 얻으려 하지만 진심이 없거나 열등하다고 여겨지는 사람을 가리킴.
example_en: He's just a wannabe rapper trying to sound cool.
example_ko: 그는 멋지게 들리려고 하는 래퍼 흉내 내는 사람일 뿐이야.

definition_en: To become angry, upset, or to speak passionately and intensely about something, often in a way that is loud or aggressive.
definition_ko: 화나거나 짜증나서 강하게 말하거나, 열정적으로 어떤 것에 대해 말하는 것.
example_en: My mom went off about my messy room again.
example_ko: 엄마가 또 내 지저분한 방 때문에 화내셨어.

definition_en: A person who is passionate and knowledgeable about specific hobbies or interests, often perceived as socially awkward or overly dedicated to their niche.
definition_ko: 특정 취미나 관심사에 열정적이고 지식이 많은 사람, 종종 사교적 서투름으로 인식됨.
example_en: He's such a nerd when it comes to video games.
example_ko: 그는 비디오 게임에 관해서는 정말 덕후야.

definition_en: An emoticon expressing warmth, cuteness, or affection; used in online and anime communities
definition_ko: 귀엽거나 다정함을 표현하는 이모티콘, 온라인과 애니메이션 커뮤니티에서 사용.
example_en: You look so cute today, uwu!

definition_en: To experience a fortunate or successful outcome, often unexpectedly or in a context of chance, such as winning, avoiding trouble, or achieving a goal.
definition_ko: 운이 좋아서 뜻밖의 성공이나 좋은 결과를 얻는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: I got lucky and found a free ticket to the show.

definition_en: Used to describe something that subtly or indirectly conveys a certain meaning, vibe, or message without explicitly stating it, often through coded language or signals.
definition_ko: 직접적으로 말하지 않고 은유적이거나 암호화된 방식으로 의미를 전달하는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: Her message was coded, I couldn't tell what she meant.
example_ko: 그녀 메시지는 은유적이어서 무슨 뜻인지 몰랐어.

definition_en: Refers to software, games, or systems that are full of bugs, glitches, or errors, often causing frustration or instability.
definition_ko: 버그나 결함이 많은 소프트웨어, 게임, 시스템을 의미합니다.
example_en: This app is so buggy, it keeps crashing.
example_ko: 이 앱 너무 버그가 많아서 계속 꺼져.

definition_en: A casual, affectionate term used to refer to oneself or others, often implying a sense of camaraderie, shared interests, or a feminine identity in a playful or informal way.
definition_ko: 친근하게 자신이나 타인을 부를 때 사용하는 말로, 여성스러움이나 친밀함을 나타냅니다.
example_en: We had a girlie night watching movies and chatting.
example_ko: 우린 영화 보고 수다 떠는 친근한 밤을 보냈어.

definition_en: Feeling excited, energized, or highly enthusiastic about something, or describing something that is swollen or enlarged, often due to air, fluid, or physical activity.
definition_ko: 흥분하거나 에너지 넘치는 상태를 표현하거나, 부풀거나 확장된 상태를 의미합니다.
example_en: I'm so pumped for the game tomorrow!

definition_en: In slang, 'shiny' refers to something that is new, attractive, or eye-catching, often used to describe rare or desirable items, experiences, or qualities.
definition_ko: 새롭거나 눈에 띄는, 희귀하거나 가치 있는 것을 의미하는 속어입니다.
example_en: Check out this shiny new phone I got!
example_ko: 이 새로 산 폰 정말 멋지고 눈에 띄어.

definition_en: A term for mental decline or obsession caused by excessive exposure to certain media, social media, or repetitive content, often implying a kind of mental stagnation or deterioration.
definition_ko: 과도한 미디어 노출이나 반복 콘텐츠로 인해 정신적 퇴화 또는 집착이 생기는 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: Watching too much TV gave me serious brain rot.

definition_en: To reveal or share secret or private information, often casually or prematurely, especially online or in informal conversations.
definition_ko: 비밀이나 사적인 정보를 무심코 또는 조급하게 누설하는 것.
example_en: Don't spill the secret, it's a surprise!

definition_en: Feeling overwhelmed, annoyed, or under pressure about a situation or person, often implying emotional or social stress.
definition_ko: 상황이나 사람에 대해 압박감이나 짜증, 스트레스를 느끼는 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: I'm feeling pressed with all these deadlines.

definition_en: To achieve a high level of success or dominance, often in a game or activity, or to destroy something completely.
definition_ko: 게임이나 활동에서 엄청난 성공이나 우위를 차지하거나, 무언가를 완전히 파괴하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: They nuked the competition in the game!

definition_en: To quickly and strategically target or eliminate someone or something, often in gaming, trading, or online contexts, sometimes for personal gain or advantage.
definition_ko: 게임이나 온라인에서 빠르고 전략적으로 목표를 잡거나 제거하는 행위, 때로는 이득을 위해 사용한다.
example_en: I managed to snipe the last item on sale.

definition_en: Used to express approval, admiration, or that something is impressive or cool.
definition_ko: 멋지고 인상적이거나 멋지다고 인정할 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: Your drawing is really neat!

definition_en: To support, reinforce, or provide an alternative plan or option, often in a context of backup or fallback.
definition_ko: 지지하거나 강화하거나 대안을 마련하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: Make sure to back up your files regularly.

definition_en: Short for 'because,' used informally to explain reasons or causes in casual conversation.
definition_ko: 'because'의 줄임말로, 이유를 간단히 설명할 때 쓴다.
example_en: I stayed home coz I wasn't feeling well.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is very unfortunate, disappointing, or evokes sympathy, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.
definition_ko: 매우 안타깝거나 실망스러운 상황을 유머러스하게 표현할 때 쓰입니다.
example_en: It's tragic that they canceled the event.

definition_en: Rolling on the floor laughing; used to express intense amusement
definition_ko: 바닥에 누워서 웃을 정도로 매우 웃긴 상황을 표현하는 인터넷 용어입니다.
example_en: That joke was so funny, I was rofling all night.
example_ko: 그 농담 정말 웃겼어, 밤새 바닥에 누워서 웃었어.

definition_en: Used to indicate the current situation or state of affairs, often meaning 'at the moment' or 'currently.'
definition_ko: 현재 상황이나 상태를 나타내는 말로, '지금' 또는 '현재'를 의미합니다.
example_en: I'm busy atm, can I call you later?

definition_en: Heaps means a large amount or a lot of something, often used to emphasize abundance or extent.
definition_ko: 많은 양이나 상당한 정도를 강조할 때 쓰입니다.
example_en: I have heaps of work to do today.

definition_en: Refers to someone who spends an excessive amount of time online, often to the point of being out of touch with reality or social norms.
definition_ko: 온라인에 과도하게 몰두하여 현실 감각이나 사회적 규범에서 벗어난 상태를 의미합니다.
example_en: He's so terminally online, he doesn't talk to real people anymore.
example_ko: 그는 너무 온라인에 빠져서 이제는 사람들과 대화도 잘 안 해.

definition_en: A person who is new or inexperienced in a particular activity, field, or community.
definition_ko: 어떤 활동이나 분야에 처음인 초보자를 의미합니다.
example_en: I'm a total newbie at this game, be patient with me.
example_ko: 이 게임 완전 초보라서 좀 참아줘.

definition_en: To go along with or accept a situation, idea, or plan, often implying flexibility or adaptability.
definition_ko: 상황이나 계획에 유연하게 적응하거나 받아들이는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: Just roll with it, everything will be fine.
example_ko: 그냥 받아들이고 넘어가, 다 괜찮을 거야.

definition_en: Refers to a person who is attractive or appealing, often implying they look good enough to be 'eaten up' or desired. It can also mean a small snack or bite of food.
definition_ko: 매력적이거나 호감 가는 사람을 비유적으로 이르는 말로, 먹거나 싶은 작은 간식도 의미합니다.
example_en: That new singer is such a snack!

definition_en: A firm refusal or disinterest in something, indicating you do not want to participate or engage.
definition_ko: 참여하거나 관심이 없음을 강하게 거절하는 표현.
example_en: Thanks for the invite, but I'll pass. Hard pass on that party.
example_ko: 초대 고마운데, 난 패스할게. 그 파티는 별로야.

definition_en: A duplicate or imitation of a product, often used to refer to cheaper or similar alternatives to more expensive items.
definition_ko: 저렴하거나 비슷한 대체품을 가리키는 말로, 모조품이나 짝퉁을 의미한다.
example_en: I bought a dupe of the designer bag for half the price.
example_ko: 그 디자이너 가방 짝퉁을 반값에 샀어.

definition_en: A significant positive transformation in a person's appearance, style, or overall confidence, often implying they look much better than before.
definition_ko: 외모, 스타일, 자신감이 크게 향상되어 훨씬 더 좋아진 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: She had a huge glow up over the summer.
example_ko: 그 여름에 엄청나게 변했어, 정말 멋져졌어.

definition_en: Refers to a character's seemingly invincible or protected status in a story, making them unlikely to die or fail regardless of circumstances.
definition_ko: 이야기 속 캐릭터가 거의 무적이거나 보호받는 것처럼 보여서 죽거나 실패하지 않는 상황.
example_en: That character has so much plot armor, they can't die.
example_ko: 그 캐릭터는 너무 무적이라 죽지 않을 거야.

definition_en: A casual greeting or way to ask 'what's up' or 'how are you,' often used in online chats or texts.
definition_ko: 간단한 인사말로, '무슨 일이야' 또는 '잘 지내?'라는 의미로 온라인 채팅이나 문자에서 자주 사용됨.
example_en: Hey, sup? Long time no see!

definition_en: Rubbish refers to something considered worthless, useless, or of poor quality, often used to dismiss opinions, items, or ideas.
definition_ko: 가치 없거나 쓸모없거나 형편없는 것을 의미하며, 의견이나 물건을 깎아내릴 때 사용됨.
example_en: That idea is rubbish, it won't work.
example_ko: 그 아이디어는 쓸모없어, 안 될 거야.

definition_en: A vulgar slang term for 'fuck you' or an insult expressing disdain or dismissal.
definition_ko: 속된 표현으로 '꺼져' 또는 무시하는 의미의 욕설임.
example_en: He just told me to cu, so I ignored him.

definition_en: Wack means something that is lame, bad, or of poor quality, often used to express disappointment or disapproval.
definition_ko: 형편없거나 별로인 것을 표현할 때 쓰이며 실망이나 불만을 나타낸다.
example_en: That movie was wack, I didn't enjoy it.

definition_en: Rizz refers to a person's charm or charisma, especially when used to attract or impress others, often effortlessly or without trying.
definition_ko: 남을 끌어들이거나 인상을 남기기 위해 자연스럽게 사용하는 매력이나 카리스마를 의미한다.
example_en: He's got mad rizz, everyone likes him.

definition_en: A strategic plan or tactic used in gaming or other competitive contexts to gain an advantage.
definition_ko: 게임이나 경쟁 상황에서 이득을 위해 사용하는 전략이나 계획을 의미한다.
example_en: We need a good strat for this game.

definition_en: A term of praise or admiration used to acknowledge someone's skill, effort, or success, often in a casual or humorous context.
definition_ko: 누군가의 실력이나 성공을 칭찬하거나 인정할 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: You're a champ for finishing that project!
example_ko: 그 프로젝트 끝내다니 정말 대단해, 챔프야!

definition_en: Referring to body parts or areas that are sweaty, musky, or stinky, often implying sexual arousal or attractiveness associated with sweat.
definition_ko: 땀이 나거나 냄새 나는 신체 부위 또는 몸 상태를 의미하며, 성적 매력이나 흥분과 연관될 수 있다.
example_en: His hands are so sweaty, he's nervous.
example_ko: 그 손이 너무 땀범벅이야, 긴장했나 봐.

definition_en: Referring to someone or something that is bold, fierce, or impressive in a raw or unapologetic way, often with a sense of admiration or intensity.
definition_ko: 대담하거나 거침없고 인상적인 행동이나 태도를 칭찬하거나 표현할 때 쓴다.
example_en: That comeback was savage!

definition_en: Something that is poorly made, unreliable, or awkwardly functioning, often with a sense of being rough or not polished.
definition_ko: 조잡하거나 믿기 어렵거나 제대로 작동하지 않는 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: That old chair is so janky, I don’t trust it to hold me.
example_ko: 저 낡은 의자는 너무 조잡해서 믿고 앉기 힘들어.

definition_en: Referring to a device, game, or system that experiences noticeable delays, stuttering, or slow performance, often due to poor connection or hardware issues.
definition_ko: 기기나 게임이 지연되거나 끊기는 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: My game is so laggy today, I keep getting killed.
example_ko: 오늘 게임이 너무 끊기는데 계속 죽겠어.

definition_en: Referring to something that seems suspicious, untrustworthy, or potentially dangerous.
definition_ko: 의심스럽거나 믿기 어렵거나 위험할 것 같은 상황이나 사람을 가리킨다.
example_en: That alley looks sketchy at night, better avoid it.
example_ko: 그 골목은 밤에 보면 의심스러워서 피하는 게 좋아.

definition_en: TL;DR (too long; didn't read) is a shorthand way of summarizing a lengthy message or text to highlight the main point quickly.
definition_ko: 긴 글이나 메시지의 핵심만 간단히 요약하는 표현.
example_en: The article was long, so I read the tl dr summary.

definition_en: A person who is socially awkward, nerdy, or lacking in social skills, often used affectionately or teasingly.
definition_ko: 사회적 어색함이나 nerd 같은 성격을 친근하게 또는 놀리듯 부르는 말.
example_en: He’s such a dork, but I like him anyway.

definition_en: To dominate or win decisively in a game or competition, often by overwhelming the opponent; can also mean to walk heavily or stomp one's feet in protest or emphasis.
definition_ko: 경기나 경쟁에서 압도적으로 이기거나, 무거운 발걸음으로 걷는 것, 또는 항의의 표시로 발을 구르는 것.
example_en: Our team stomped the opponents in the finals!

definition_en: Boosting refers to the act of artificially increasing one's rank, points, or status in a game or activity, often through external help or unfair means.
definition_ko: 게임이나 활동에서 부정하게 외부 도움으로 순위나 점수, 지위를 인위적으로 높이는 행위.
example_en: He got banned for boosting his rank unfairly.

definition_en: An expression used to praise something as perfect, beautiful, or impressive, often accompanied by a gesture mimicking a kiss with the fingers.
definition_ko: 무언가가 완벽하거나 인상적일 때 칭찬하는 표현으로, 손가락으로 키스하는 제스처를 함께한다.
example_en: This pizza is amazing, chef's kiss!
example_ko: 이 피자 정말 맛있어, 완벽해! 손가락으로 키스하는 표정으로.

definition_en: Used to express strong disbelief, doubt, or that something is highly unlikely or impossible.
definition_ko: 어떤 일이 일어나기 어렵거나 불가능하다고 강하게 부정하는 표현입니다.
example_en: You think you can beat me? No shot!
example_ko: 네가 나를 이길 거라고? 절대 아니야!

definition_en: A phrase used to affirm or agree strongly, similar to saying 'definitely' or 'sure thing.'
definition_ko: 확실히 그렇거나 동의할 때 강하게 긍정을 나타내는 표현입니다.
example_en: Are you coming to the party? You bet!

definition_en: A casual, friendly term used to address a friend or acquaintance, similar to 'bro' or 'dude.'
definition_ko: 친구나 지인을 친근하게 부를 때 쓰는 말로, '형', '친구' 같은 의미입니다.
example_en: Hey broski, want to grab some coffee?

definition_en: To suddenly become very popular or successful, or to cause something to explode or burst, often metaphorically in contexts like gaming, AI, or social situations.
definition_ko: 갑자기 인기가 높아지거나 성공하는 것, 또는 폭발하는 것을 비유적으로 표현합니다.
example_en: That song blew up on TikTok last week.
example_ko: 그 노래 지난주에 틱톡에서 엄청 인기였어.

definition_en: A derogatory term used to refer to someone perceived as foolish, incompetent, or a clown, often in a dismissive or mocking way.
definition_ko: 어리석거나 무능하다고 여겨지는 사람을 조롱하는 비하 용어이다.
example_en: Don’t be a bozo, think before you act.
example_ko: 바보 같은 짓 하지 마, 생각 좀 하고.

definition_en: In slang, 'banging' means something that is very good, impressive, or exciting, often used to describe music, food, or experiences. It can also refer to sexual activity, but in the examples, it primarily signifies something outstanding or excellent.
definition_ko: 음악, 음식, 경험이 매우 뛰어나거나 흥미롭다는 의미이며, 성적 의미도 있지만 주로 뛰어남을 강조한다.
example_en: This new track is banging!

definition_en: A slang phrase meaning to improve one's skills or become better at a game or activity, often used sarcastically or as a challenge.
definition_ko: 실력을 향상시키거나 더 잘하라는 의미의 속어로, 비꼬거나 도전하는 의미로 쓰인다.
example_en: You need to git gud if you want to win.

definition_en: To make a mistake, error, or cause a problem, often unintentionally, which can disrupt or spoil something.
definition_ko: 실수하거나 문제를 일으켜 무언가를 망치거나 어지럽히는 것.
example_en: I think I messed up the project deadline.

definition_en: Fixed That For You; used when humorously correcting or editing someone's statement
definition_ko: 누군가의 말을 유머러스하게 수정하거나 고친 것을 의미한다.
example_en: Your sentence was confusing, so I ftfy it.
example_ko: 네 문장이 좀 헷갈려서 내가 고쳤어.

definition_en: In slang, 'slapping' refers to something being impressive, exciting, or highly effective, often used to describe music, visuals, or actions that hit strongly. It can also mean to physically strike or hit someone.
definition_ko: 인상적이거나 강렬한 효과를 내는 것, 또는 음악이나 영상이 매우 좋음을 의미한다.
example_en: That new album is slapping!

definition_en: Referring to something that is overly sentimental, corny, or cheesy in a way that can be perceived as tacky or lacking originality.
definition_ko: 너무 감상적이거나 진부해서 촌스럽거나 독창적이지 않은 것을 의미.
example_en: That movie was so cheesy, I couldn’t stop laughing.
example_ko: 그 영화 너무 감성적이어서 웃음이 멈추지 않았어.

definition_en: To successfully execute or accomplish something difficult, impressive, or risky, often requiring skill or confidence.
definition_ko: 어려운 일이나 위험한 일을 성공적으로 해내거나 성취하는 것.
example_en: She pulled off an amazing dance move!

definition_en: Brother; British slang term of address for a friend or mate
definition_ko: 친구나 동료를 부를 때 쓰는 영국식 친근한 표현.
example_en: Hey bruv, want to grab some coffee later?

definition_en: A 'glazer' refers to someone who is perceived as a fan, supporter, or enthusiast of a particular person, team, or idea, often with a connotation of loyalty or admiration, especially in online communities.
definition_ko: 특정 인물이나 팀, 아이디어에 열성적이거나 충성심을 보이는 팬이나 지지자.
example_en: He's such a glazer for that new band.
example_ko: 그는 그 새 밴드 팬이라서 완전 열광해.

definition_en: To fail or perform poorly, especially in a public or noticeable way, such as a failed plan, unsuccessful sales, or a poor performance.
definition_ko: 공개적이거나 눈에 띄게 실패하거나 저조한 성과를 내는 것.
example_en: That movie was a total flop.

definition_en: BRB means 'be right back,' indicating the speaker will return shortly after leaving temporarily.
definition_ko: 잠시 후 돌아오겠다는 의미의 '곧 돌아올게'라는 약어.
example_en: Gotta go, brb!

definition_en: A term for an average or mainstream person who is considered unoriginal, conventional, or lacking in niche or alternative interests.
definition_ko: 평범하거나 주류인 사람을 비하하거나 가리키는 말.
example_en: I don't hang out with normies.

definition_en: To perform exceptionally well, get excited, or express oneself passionately, often in a way that draws attention or shows confidence.
definition_ko: 멋지게 성과를 내거나 열정을 보여주는 것, 자신감 있게 표현하는 것.
example_en: She really popped off during her speech.
example_ko: 그녀 연설할 때 정말 멋지게 나왔어.

definition_en: An emphatic phrase used to assert sincerity, seriousness, or truthfulness about a statement or feeling, often expressing strong emotion or conviction.
definition_ko: 진심이나 강한 감정을 강조하며, 사실임을 확실히 하고 싶을 때 쓰는 표현이다.
example_en: Swear to god, I didn't take your book.
example_ko: 진심으로 말하는데, 네 책 안 가져갔어.

definition_en: A temporary or anonymous online account used for privacy, avoiding detection, or specific purposes, often discarded afterward.
definition_ko: 일시적이거나 익명으로 사용하는 온라인 계정을 의미하며, 이후 버리거나 폐기하는 경우가 많다.
example_en: I used a throwaway account to comment.

definition_en: A 'burner' is a temporary or anonymous phone or online account used for privacy or discreet purposes.
definition_ko: 일시적이거나 익명으로 사용하는 전화번호 또는 온라인 계정을 의미한다.
example_en: He bought a burner phone for privacy.
example_ko: 그는 프라이버시 위해 일회용 폰 샀어.

definition_en: A derogatory term for someone perceived as overly sensitive, easily offended, or fragile, often used dismissively online.
definition_ko: 과도하게 민감하거나 쉽게 상처받는 사람을 비하하는 표현으로, 온라인에서 무시하거나 깎아내릴 때 사용한다.
example_en: Don't be such a snowflake about it.

definition_en: In slang, 'vanilla' describes something that is plain, conventional, or lacking in excitement, especially in the context of sexual preferences or activities.
definition_ko: 지루하거나 특별하지 않은, 평범하거나 전통적인 것을 의미하며, 특히 성적 취향이나 활동에 쓰인다.
example_en: Their date was pretty vanilla, nothing special.

definition_en: An individual, often young, who deliberately posts provocative, dark, or controversial content to appear edgy or rebellious, often for attention or to seem cool.
definition_ko: 의도적으로 도발적이거나 어둡거나 논란이 되는 콘텐츠를 게시하는 젊은 사람, 주목받거나 멋있어 보이기 위해.
example_en: He's just an edgelord trying to get attention.
example_ko: 그는 관심 끌려고 일부러 도발하는 애야.

definition_en: Used to describe something as excellent, impressive, or cool.
definition_ko: 멋지고 인상적이거나 훌륭하다고 표현할 때 사용.
example_en: That skateboard trick was wicked!

definition_en: To meet up or connect with someone, often casually or socially, either in person or online.
definition_ko: 사람이나 온라인에서 만남 또는 연결하는 것.
example_en: Let's link up later for lunch.

definition_en: A humorous or exaggerated term for hope or optimism that may be unrealistic or overly optimistic, often used to describe false hope or wishful thinking.
definition_ko: 비현실적이거나 과도하게 낙관적인 희망이나 기대를 농담이나 과장해서 이르는 말.
example_en: He's full of hopium about the new project.
example_ko: 그는 새 프로젝트에 너무 희망을 품고 있어.

definition_en: Referring to something that is smooth, stylish, or impressive in appearance or manner, often with a sense of being clever or slickly executed.
definition_ko: 매끄럽고 세련되거나 인상적인 모습이나 태도를 가리키며, 영리하거나 능숙하게 잘 처리된 것을 의미함.
example_en: That presentation was really slick.

definition_en: A playful or affectionate term for someone who is silly, goofy, or a bit awkward, often used in a teasing or endearing way.
definition_ko: 바보 같거나 어리숙한 사람을 친근하게 부르는 말로, 장난스럽거나 애정 어린 표현임.
example_en: Stop acting like a goober!

definition_en: In slang, 'ace' refers to something excellent, impressive, or of high quality, often used to describe skills, items, or attributes.
definition_ko: 뛰어나거나 인상적이거나 높은 품질을 의미하며, 능력이나 성과를 칭찬할 때 사용.
example_en: You aced the test!

definition_en: A mistake, blunder, or silly error, often used humorously or casually to refer to a minor fault or misstep.
definition_ko: 작은 실수나 실책을 의미하며, 유머러스하거나 캐주얼하게 사용됨.
example_en: I made a little goof on my report.

definition_en: A casual way to say thank you, goodbye, or to express good wishes, often used in informal conversations.
definition_ko: 감사, 작별 인사 또는 좋은 소원을 casual하게 표현하는 말.
example_en: Thanks for your help, cheers!

definition_en: Used to describe something as extremely intense, impressive, or serious, often with a sense of danger or high impact.
definition_ko: 매우 강렬하거나 인상적이며, 때로는 위험하거나 심각한 상황을 표현한다.
example_en: That skateboard trick was deadly! So impressive.
example_ko: 그 스케이트보드 묘기 진짜 강렬했어! 대단했어.

definition_en: A phrase used to emphasize honesty or seriousness about a statement, often signaling that what follows is genuine or important.
definition_ko: 진지하거나 솔직한 말을 강조할 때 쓰인다.
example_en: Honestly, real talk, you should rest more.
example_ko: 솔직히 말해서, 진지하게, 너 좀 더 쉬어야 해.

definition_en: A humorous way to refer to a very low or unimpressive amount of something, implying that it's not enough or is surprisingly small.
definition_ko: 매우 적거나 미미한 양을 농담으로 표현할 때 쓰인다.
example_en: Only 10 likes? That's rookie numbers for a viral post.

definition_en: In online contexts, 'oop' is used as an exclamation to acknowledge a mistake, surprise, or to get attention, similar to 'oops' or 'whoops.'
definition_ko: 실수나 놀라움을 인정하거나 주의를 끌기 위해 사용하는 감탄사이다.
example_en: Oops, I forgot your birthday—oop!

definition_en: To interfere with, manipulate, or challenge someone or something, often implying risk or trouble.
definition_ko: 누군가를 방해하거나 도전하는 행동을 의미한다.
example_en: Don't mess with me when I'm tired.

definition_en: A term of endearment or affectionate nickname, often used to refer to someone cute, lovable, or special, sometimes with playful or teasing connotations.
definition_ko: 귀엽거나 사랑스러운 사람을 애정 표현으로 부르는 말, 장난스럽거나 유혹적인 의미도 포함.
example_en: You're such a pookie when you're sleepy.
example_ko: 너 피곤할 때 정말 귀엽다, pookie.

definition_en: Funky describes something that is unusual, distinctive, or has a unique, often quirky or offbeat quality, whether in smell, appearance, or style.
definition_ko: 이상하거나 독특하거나 개성 있는 상태를 묘사하는 말, 냄새, 외모, 스타일 등 다양한 맥락에서 쓰임.
example_en: This new jacket has a funky style.

definition_en: A short, informal way of saying 'congratulations' to someone on their achievement or good news.
definition_ko: 누군가의 성취나 좋은 소식에 대해 축하하는 짧고 비공식적인 표현이다.
example_en: Grats on your promotion!

definition_en: To become very angry, upset, or overwhelmed, often losing control of one's emotions or composure.
definition_ko: 감정이 폭발하거나 통제력을 잃고 화나거나 당황하는 상태를 의미한다.
example_en: He almost lost it when he saw the bill.
example_ko: 그는 계산서 보고 거의 화낼 뻔했어.

definition_en: In gaming and online contexts, 'raid' refers to a coordinated group activity or attack, often in multiplayer games or virtual spaces, involving multiple participants working together.
definition_ko: 멀티플레이 게임이나 온라인 공간에서 여러 참가자가 함께 공격하거나 협력하는 집단 활동을 의미한다.
example_en: We did a raid in the game last night.

definition_en: A casual way of saying 'no problem,' indicating that something is easy, acceptable, or no trouble at all.
definition_ko: 문제없다는 의미로, 쉽게 받아들이거나 아무 것도 아니란 뜻이다.
example_en: Thanks for helping! No prob.

definition_en: To perform exceptionally well or succeed impressively at something, often with confidence or style.
definition_ko: 무언가를 매우 잘하거나 멋지게 해내는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: You killed it in your performance!
example_ko: 네 공연 정말 멋졌어! 완전 kill했어.

definition_en: To secure or confirm a decision, position, or commitment, often quickly or decisively.
definition_ko: 결정을 확정하거나 확실히 하는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: Let's lock in the plan today.

definition_en: To arrive at or approach a location, often casually or unexpectedly, or to bring something into view or focus.
definition_ko: 어떤 장소에 도착하거나 다가가는 것을 의미한다.
example_en: I'll pull up to your place at 7.

definition_en: Refers to a person's intelligence or common sense, often implying someone is very stupid or lacking mental capacity.
definition_ko: 사람의 지능이나 상식을 비하하거나 무시하는 표현으로, 매우 멍청하거나 정신적 능력이 부족하다는 의미입니다.
example_en: That idea doesn't take many brain cells.
example_ko: 그 아이디어는 뇌를 많이 쓰지 않네.

definition_en: A casual, informal contraction of 'you know,' used to fill pauses, emphasize a point, or seek agreement in conversation.
definition_ko: 대화 중 잠시 멈추거나, 강조하거나, 동의를 구할 때 쓰는 'you know'의 비공식 축약형입니다.
example_en: Yknow, I was thinking the same thing.

definition_en: Feeling emotionally or physically aroused, agitated, or highly excited, often in a sexual or frustrated context.
definition_ko: 감정적 또는 신체적으로 흥분하거나 화나거나 매우 들뜬 상태를 의미하며, 종종 성적이거나 좌절된 맥락에서 쓰입니다.
example_en: She got really worked up about the news.

definition_en: Excited; enthusiastic; hyped up (British slang)
definition_ko: 영국 속어로, 흥분하거나 열광하거나 과도하게 신난 상태를 의미합니다.
example_en: He was gassed after winning the game.

definition_en: To hit or strike someone or something, often playfully or in a humorous context, such as a headbutt or a physical attack in gaming or casual conversation.
definition_ko: 장난스럽거나 유머러스하게 누군가를 때리거나 부딪치는 행위로, 주로 머리를 박거나 가볍게 공격하는 의미입니다.
example_en: I bonked my head on the doorframe.

definition_en: A humorous or sarcastic way to acknowledge someone’s appreciation for refined, sophisticated, or culturally interesting things, often used playfully online.
definition_ko: 세련되고 문화적인 것에 관심이 많은 사람을 유머러스하거나 풍자적으로 인정하는 표현입니다.
example_en: You're a real man of culture with that music taste.
example_ko: 그 음악 취향 보면 진짜 세련된 사람이네.

definition_en: To become very popular, widely shared, or viral, especially online or on social media.
definition_ko: 온라인이나 SNS에서 매우 인기를 끌거나 급속히 확산되는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: That video is blowing up on TikTok right now!
example_ko: 그 영상이 지금 틱톡에서 엄청 인기야!

definition_en: Refers to establishments like pubs, clubs, or venues where people gather for socializing, drinking, or entertainment.
definition_ko: 술집, 클럽, 또는 사람들이 모여 사교하거나 즐기는 장소를 의미합니다.
example_en: Let's hit the new bar downtown tonight.
example_ko: 오늘 밤에 시내 새 술집 가자!

definition_en: A mild intensifier used in place of 'fucking' to express emphasis or frustration in an informal or humorous way.
definition_ko: 'fucking' 대신 가볍게 강하게 강조하거나 짜증을 표현하는 비속어입니다.
example_en: That fricking movie was so good!

definition_en: Used to describe someone or something that is exceptional, unique, or superior in a way that sets them apart from others, often implying they are capable of extraordinary feats or qualities.
definition_ko: 남들과 달리 뛰어나거나 특별한 능력을 가진 사람이나 사물을 의미합니다.
example_en: She trains every day, she's built different.

definition_en: Used to describe something that is creepy, eerie, or associated with Halloween and spooky themes.
definition_ko: 귀엽거나 무서운 분위기, 또는 할로윈과 관련된 섬뜩한 느낌을 표현할 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: This old house looks kinda spooky at night.
example_ko: 이 오래된 집 밤에 좀 무서워 보여.

definition_en: An abbreviation for 'oh my lord' or 'oh my God,' used to express surprise, shock, or strong emotion online.
definition_ko: 놀라움이나 충격을 온라인에서 간단히 표현하는 약어입니다.
example_en: Oml, I can't believe that just happened!
example_ko: 어머나, 그게 진짜 일어나다니 믿을 수 없어!

definition_en: To accept a loss, failure, or unfavorable outcome without protest or resistance.
definition_ko: 패배나 실패를 받아들이는 태도를 의미합니다.
example_en: Sometimes you just have to take the l and move on.

definition_en: A special ability, advantage, or bonus that enhances a character's performance or gameplay in a video game context.
definition_ko: 게임에서 캐릭터의 능력이나 성능을 높이는 특별한 능력이나 이점을 의미합니다.
example_en: One perk of this job is flexible hours.
example_ko: 이 일의 장점 중 하나는 유연한 근무 시간이지.

definition_en: Refers to a person who is perceived as lacking independent thought, originality, or personality, often acting in a predictable or robotic manner, especially in online discussions or social contexts.
definition_ko: 독립적 사고나 개성이 부족하고 예측 가능하거나 기계적인 행동을 하는 사람을 가리키며, 온라인이나 사회적 맥락에서 자주 사용됩니다.
example_en: That guy just keeps repeating the same thing, total npc.
example_ko: 저 사람은 계속 똑같은 말만 반복하네, 완전 NPC야.

definition_en: An informal exclamation used to express excitement, acknowledgment, or to get someone's attention, often in online or casual conversations.
definition_ko: 흥분이나 인정을 표현하거나 주목을 끌기 위해 온라인이나 캐주얼한 대화에서 사용하는 감탄사입니다.
example_en: Ayy, what's up man!

definition_en: A casual abbreviation of 'definitely,' used to express certainty or agreement in informal contexts.
definition_ko: 'definitely'의 약어로, 비공식적 상황에서 확실하거나 동의할 때 사용됩니다.
example_en: That concert was deff the best I've been to!

definition_en: Money earned with minimal effort or risk, often through quick, opportunistic, or sometimes shady means.
definition_ko: 적은 노력이나 위험으로 버는 돈을 의미하며, 빠르고 기회주의적이거나 때로는 불법적인 수단을 가리킵니다.
example_en: He made easy money selling those sneakers.
example_ko: 그는 그 운동화 팔아서 쉽게 돈 벌었어.

definition_en: To stay in a place or situation for a longer period, often implying continued participation or presence.
definition_ko: 어떤 장소나 상황에 계속 머무르거나 참여하는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: You should stick around for the after-party.

definition_en: A term of endearment used to describe someone who is adorable, sweet, or charming.
definition_ko: 귀엽거나 사랑스럽거나 매력적인 사람을 애정 어린 표현으로 부를 때 사용합니다.
example_en: Aww, you're such a cutie pie!

definition_en: In slang, 'Snapchat' is used to refer to the app as a platform for sharing explicit photos or messages privately, often in contexts involving sexting or adult content.
definition_ko: 익명 또는 비공개로 성인 콘텐츠를 공유하는 플랫폼으로 사용된다.
example_en: He sent me a funny snap on Snapchat.

definition_en: A casual greeting equivalent to 'what's up' or 'hello,' used to ask how someone is or what's happening.
definition_ko: 가볍게 인사하거나 근황을 묻는 말이다.
example_en: Wassup! Long time no see.

definition_en: An expression of mild frustration, disappointment, or regret when something doesn't go as planned or expected.
definition_ko: 일이 잘못되었거나 기대에 못 미칠 때 아쉬움이나 실망을 표현한다.
example_en: Dang it, I missed the bus again.

definition_en: A variation of 'type of,' used to refer to a particular kind or example of something, often with a dismissive or informal tone.
definition_ko: 어떤 종류나 예시를 가볍게 지칭할 때 쓰는 비격식적 표현이다.
example_en: That's a weird typa of music.

definition_en: Used to mean 'in addition' or 'also,' often emphasizing an extra point or detail.
definition_ko: 추가로, 게다가라는 의미로 강조할 때 쓰입니다.
example_en: She’s talented and smart to boot.

definition_en: Refers to someone who spends an excessive amount of time on a particular activity, especially gaming, to the point of neglecting other aspects of life.
definition_ko: 게임이나 특정 활동에 너무 몰두해 다른 삶이 없다고 비판하는 말입니다.
example_en: He spends all day gaming, total no life.
example_ko: 그는 하루 종일 게임만 해서 완전 노라이프야.

definition_en: In slang, 'spawn' refers to a specific location or point where characters or items appear, often used in gaming contexts to describe a strategic position or the act of appearing at that point.
definition_ko: 게임에서 캐릭터나 아이템이 나타나는 위치를 의미하거나, 등장하는 순간을 가리킵니다.
example_en: I just spawned at the new game location, ready to fight!
example_ko: 방금 새 게임 위치에 스폰됐어, 싸울 준비 완료!

definition_en: To become extremely excited, enthusiastic, or to act wildly, often in response to something impressive or stimulating.
definition_ko: 흥분하거나 열광하며 미친 듯이 행동하는 것을 의미합니다.
example_en: When I saw the surprise, I went nuts!

definition_en: To accept a situation as it is and adapt without resistance, often implying flexibility and resilience.
definition_ko: 상황을 있는 그대로 받아들이고 적응하는 것, 유연성과 회복력을 의미한다.
example_en: The plan changed, so I just rolled with it.

definition_en: Refers to someone demonstrating clever, strategic, or insightful thinking, often in a humorous or exaggerated way.
definition_ko: 똑똑하거나 전략적이며 통찰력 있는 사람을 유머러스하게 칭하는 표현.
example_en: You solved that puzzle? Big brain move!

definition_en: A phrase used to honestly express an opinion or feeling, often indicating sincerity or emphasizing truthfulness in a statement.
definition_ko: 솔직하게 의견이나 감정을 표현할 때 사용하는 말로, 진실성을 강조한다.
example_en: I can't lie, that movie was awesome.
example_ko: 솔직히 말해서, 그 영화 진짜 최고였어.

definition_en: An informal way of saying someone is okay, capable, or has permission to proceed with something.
definition_ko: 상대방이 괜찮거나 허락받았음을 친근하게 말하는 표현.
example_en: Can I borrow your pen? You're good.

definition_en: In online or informal contexts, 'dl' typically refers to a 'download' or 'down low,' meaning to keep something secret or discreet.
definition_ko: 온라인에서 '다운로드' 또는 비밀스럽게 무언가를 숨기거나 유지하는 의미로 쓰인다.
example_en: I sent you the file, check your dl folder.

definition_en: To observe or browse online content quietly without actively participating or commenting.
definition_ko: 온라인 콘텐츠를 조용히 관찰하거나 댓글 없이 지켜보는 것.
example_en: I like to lurk in online forums and read posts.

definition_en: To pretend to be someone else online, often to deceive or manipulate others in romantic or social contexts.
definition_ko: 온라인에서 다른 사람인 척 속이거나 조작하는 행위.
example_en: He turned out to be a catfish online.
